title: Dashboard
description: Your club card, profile status, partner access, and business activity in one place.
cardDescription: Use the QR code or public verification link when a partner needs to confirm your membership status.
cardMissingDescription: Your digital club card was not found. Contact the club team if this state does not change.
profileDescription: Manage your profile information and avatar.
phoneReadOnly: This number is used to log in and cannot be changed here.
avatarHint: An avatar is optional but strongly recommended.
bioHint: A brief description about yourself (max 500 characters).
profileFormError: Could not save your profile. Please try again.
profileAvatarError: Photo upload failed. Check the file or try again.
quickActionsDescription: Jump to directory, card verification, and other member tools.
businessDescription: Published businesses appear in the public directory. Draft and pending profiles stay private.
noBusinessDescription: Business profile submission is a later MVP surface. For now, admin can manage existing profiles.
introductionsDescription: Recommend a business opportunity to a verified partner. VIP members can submit requests directly from this tab.
introductionsRestricted: Business Introduction access is available for business members.
upgradeVipDescription: Unlock VIP features, submit one business profile, and access Business Introductions.
upgradeVipError: Checkout could not be started. Please try again.
cancelVipDescription: Cancel online anytime. VIP access stays active until the end of the paid period.
cancelVipScheduled: Cancellation is scheduled for the end of the current period.
cancelVipError: VIP membership could not be canceled.
subscriptionDescription: Manage your VIP membership and billing status.
checkoutSuccessDescription: Your payment was received. VIP access will appear in your dashboard once Stripe confirms the subscription.
checkoutCancelDescription: No charge was made. You can return to your dashboard and try again when ready.
businessSubmittedDescription: Your business profile is being reviewed by the club team.
businessVipReadyDescription: VIP members can submit one business profile for club verification.
businessVipRequiredDescription: Upgrade to VIP before submitting a business profile.
businessFormDescription: Provide the details required for club verification and directory review.
businessFormError: Business profile could not be submitted.
featuresDescription: Choose the membership level that fits your goals — from directory access to VIP networking and verified business placement.
planMemberPriceNote: Free access to the club directory and digital card.
settingsDescription: Update your profile and manage account preferences.
billingPortalError: Billing portal could not be opened. Please try again.
settingsDeleteAccountDescription: Contact the club team to request account deletion.
welcomeModalTitle: Congratulations! Welcome to KYLYVNYK Business Club!
displayNameHint: Please enter your full name, or a display name you are comfortable with.
emailHint: Your primary email will be used for account-related notifications.
userIdHint: This is your user ID within Kylyvnyk Business Club.
subscriptionStatusDescription: Review your current VIP subscription state and keep billing details up to date.
subscriptionNoData: No active subscription details are available for this account yet.
subscriptionAutoPayDescription: Control whether your VIP subscription renews automatically at the end of the current paid period.
subscriptionPaymentMethodsDescription: Choose the default card for future charges or add a new card to your Stripe billing profile.
subscriptionNoPaymentMethods: No saved card payment methods were found for this account.
subscriptionSelectDefaultCard: Select which saved card should be used for upcoming renewals.
subscriptionAddCardDescription: Enter a card to attach it to your billing profile and make it available for future renewals.
subscriptionAddCardError: The card could not be added. Please try again.
subscriptionTransactionsDescription: Review recent Stripe invoices and open each record when you need the hosted invoice or PDF receipt.
subscriptionNoTransactions: No recent subscription transactions were found.
subscriptionBillingPortalDescription: Open the Stripe billing portal if you need advanced billing tools that are not shown here.
